entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The primary subsistence crop in the East Indian Plateau region whose failure leads to food insecurity.

entities.name: FOOD INSECURITY
entities.description: A condition resulting from the failure or low yield of the rice crop.

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A health condition resulting from the failure or low yield of the rice crop.

entities.name: EAST INDIAN PLATEAU
entities.description: The geographic region where the study on crop diversification was conducted.

entities.name: CROP DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: The strategy of introducing various crops to reduce production risks and increase income.

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: An environmental factor whose variability affects rice production.

entities.name: CASH INCOME
entities.description: Income generated from the sale of non-subsistence crops.

entities.name: WOMEN FARMERS
entities.description: The primary household laborers and participants in the agricultural experiments.

entities.name: BOKARO
entities.description: A district in Jharkhand state where experiments were conducted.

entities.name: WEST SINGHBHUM
entities.description: A district in Jharkhand state where experiments were conducted.

entities.name: JHARKHAND
entities.description: An Indian state where the research was conducted.

entities.name: PURULIA
entities.description: A district in West Bengal state where experiments were conducted.

entities.name: WEST BENGAL
entities.description: An Indian state where the research was conducted.

entities.name: VEGETABLES
entities.description: A category of crops used to diversify production systems.

entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: A category of crops used in rotation and intercropping for diversification.

entities.name: UPLAND
entities.description: A type of terrain where vegetable and legume experiments were conducted.

entities.name: MEDIUM UPLANDS
entities.description: A type of terrain where vegetable and legume experiments were conducted.

entities.name: CUCURBITS
entities.description: A vegetable system grown during the rainy/kharif season.

entities.name: TOMATOES
entities.description: A vegetable system grown during the off-season rainy period.

entities.name: BEANS
entities.description: A legume crop intercropped with maize.

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A crop intercropped with beans.

entities.name: INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The agricultural practice of growing two or more crops in proximity, specifically beans and maize.

entities.name: DIRECT SOWING
entities.description: A method of planting rice used in rotation with legume crops.

entities.name: INCOME
entities.description: The financial gain achieved by farmers through diversified crop systems.

entities.name: RETURN PER PERSON DAY
entities.description: A metric used to measure the economic efficiency of the new crop systems.

entities.name: INPUT COST
entities.description: The expenditure required to implement the new diversified crop systems.
